title: ProtocolLab Public Report Contract Verification
scope: This verification covers generated public publication bundle schema conformance and the canonical-public-payload boundary. It does not prove live Cloudflare R2 or D1 state.
verification_method: Run focused runner and publication tests that generate representative public bundles, validate JSON files against `schemas/public-report/v1`, and assert that the canonical evidence report carries schema version, per-cell measurements, and sanitized artifact paths.
preconditions: Repository public report schema files exist under `schemas/public-report/v1`.
The focused runner and publication tests can create completed runs under temporary artifact roots.
procedure: Run `powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts\publication\New-ProtocolLabPublicReportBundle.ps1` to create a local run and staged bundle.

Run `dotnet run --project src\Incursa.ProtocolLab.Cli -- publish-report --run .artifacts\runs\{runId} --output .artifacts\publication\{runId} --visibility public --dry-run` for an available completed run.
expected_result: Generated public bundle JSON validates against the repository-owned public report schemas, the canonical evidence report includes per-cell measurements and diagnostics, supporting metadata remains derived, and SpecTrace validation passes.
evidence: ReportPublicationTests include schema validation for `evidence-report-v1.json`, `artifacts-index.json`, `publication-manifest.json`, `report-index-entry.json`, and `report-index.json`.
RunnerContractTests assert that benchmark `run` emits `evidence-report-v1.json` and a `public-report-bundle` artifact reference.
RunnerContractFixtureLabTests assert that fixture benchmark runs stage `evidence-report-v1.json` and `artifacts-index.json` under the publication output.

AcceptanceScriptTests confirm the local public report script passes `--publication-output`, preserves dry-run restaging via `--skip-publication-bundle`, preserves diagnostic publication labeling, and does not upload to R2 or write D1 metadata.
ReportPublicationTests assert `protocol-lab.evidence-report.v1`, per-cell measurements, and bundle-relative artifact paths in generated `evidence-report-v1.json`.
Publication handoff documentation identifies D1 as searchable metadata rather than the full report JSON store.
status_summary: Public report contract verification is represented by focused tests and repository validation. Live R2/D1 confirmation remains a CI or operator handoff concern.
